name: Guyana Gold Corp.
summary: Guyana Gold Corp., a junior mineral exploration company, engages in the identification, acquisition, and development of precious and base metal properties in the Caribbean. It primarily focuses on gold, diamond, bauxite, and semiprecious stones. The company holds a 50% working interest in various mineral projects comprising 6 blocks located along the Guyana Shield region of Port Kaituma in Guyana. Guyana Gold Corp. is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
